items.label: Error
items.value: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for re-signing when form version changes.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step requires validation of the requirement for 'Re-sign requirement when form version changes', but there is no direct evidence provided in the prior steps or linked use cases that confirms its implementation or existence. While the linked use case mentions the need for re-signing when the form version changes, the absence of any evidence related to this specific requirement indicates a gap in the requirement coverage. Therefore, the validation step is inconclusive due to insufficient evidence.
